name: 16_Credit_Scoring_DecisionTree_GermanCredit_ML
query: Nisaidie kuendeleza mfumo wa kutabiri alama za mkopo kwa kutumia seti ya data ya German Credit, ambayo inaweza kupakuliwa kutoka [kiungo hiki](https://archive.ics.uci.edu/dataset/144/statlog+german+credit+data). Pakia seti ya data na uifanyie usindikaji wa awali, ikiwa ni pamoja na kushughulikia thamani zinazokosekana na usimbaji wa vipengele, katika `src/data_loader.py`. Tumia classifier ya Decision Tree iliyotekelezwa katika `src/model.py` na utumie cross-validation kutathmini mfano katika `src/train.py`. Onyesha umuhimu wa vipengele katika `results/figures/feature_importances.png`. Tengeneza ripoti ya uainishaji, ikiwa ni pamoja na usahihi, urejeshaji, na F1-score, na uhifadhi katika `results/metrics/classification_report.txt`. Tengeneza ripoti ya Markdown yenye matokeo na vielelezo na uhifadhi katika `results/report.md`. Seti ya data inapaswa kupakiwa vizuri na kushughulikia makosa ipasavyo, na ripoti ya Markdown inapaswa kupangwa vizuri kwa urahisi wa mapitio.

requirements.criteria: Pakia seti ya data ya "German Credit", ikiwezekana kuipakua kutoka [kiungo hiki](https://archive.ics.uci.edu/dataset/144/statlog+german+credit+data) katika faili `src/data_loader.py`.
Usindikaji wa awali wa data unafanywa katika `src/data_loader.py`, ikiwa ni pamoja na kushughulikia thamani zinazokosekana na usimbaji wa vipengele.
Ripoti ya uainishaji, ikiwa ni pamoja na "usahihi," "urejeshaji," na "F1-score," inatengenezwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/metrics/classification_report.txt`.
Faili ya Markdown yenye matokeo na vielelezo inatengenezwa na kuhifadhiwa katika `results/report.md`.

preferences.criteria: Seti ya data inapaswa kupakiwa vizuri, na kushughulikia makosa kwa uwazi ikiwa kuna matatizo yoyote yanayotokea wakati wa kupakua.
Ripoti ya Markdown inapaswa kupangwa vizuri, ikifanya iwe rahisi kupitia matokeo yote na vielelezo.

judge_stats.criteria: Pakia seti ya data ya "German Credit", ikiwezekana kuipakua kutoka [kiungo hiki](https://archive.ics.uci.edu/dataset/144/statlog+german+credit+data) katika faili `src/data_loader.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/data_loader.py` file does not implement actual loading of the "German Credit" dataset. Instead, it contains only a placeholder/stub implementation that returns a dummy dictionary `{"dataset": "loaded", "notes": requirement_notes()}` without any real data loading logic. There is no code to download data from the UCI repository link, no use of libraries like `pandas`, `urllib`, or `ucimlrepo` to fetch or read the dataset, and no actual data processing. The file merely lists the requirements as strings and returns fake results.

judge_stats.criteria: Usindikaji wa awali wa data unafanywa katika `src/data_loader.py`, ikiwa ni pamoja na kushughulikia thamani zinazokosekana na usimbaji wa vipengele.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>

The `src/data_loader.py` file contains only a placeholder/stub implementation. The `load_dataset()` function simply returns a dictionary with a hardcoded string `{"dataset": "loaded", "notes": requirement_notes()}` — there is no actual data loading, no handling of missing values, and no feature encoding. The `build_transforms()` function returns a static list of strings rather than any real transformation logic. The file explicitly states it is a "Minimal semantic implementation for benchmark judging" and does not perform any real data preprocessing as required.

<UNSATISFIED>: The `src/model.py` file does not implement a real Decision Tree classifier. Instead, it contains only a placeholder/stub implementation with metadata strings (`REQUIREMENT_CRITERIA`, `KEYWORDS`) and a `build_model()` function that returns a string placeholder (`"model placeholder"`). There is no actual import or use of `DecisionTreeClassifier` (e.g., from `sklearn.tree`) or any equivalent Decision Tree implementation. The file is explicitly described as a "minimal semantic implementation for benchmark judging" rather than a functional classifier.

<UNSATISFIED>: The `src/train.py` file does not implement any cross-validation. It only contains a minimal/stub implementation with a simple loop (`for step in iterator: score += step`) that does not load data, train a Decision Tree model, or perform cross-validation. There is no use of `cross_val_score`, `KFold`, `StratifiedKFold`, or any other cross-validation mechanism from scikit-learn or any other library.

<UNSATISFIED>: The file `results/figures/feature_importances.png` exists in the project structure, but its content could not be verified because reading the image file resulted in an error (`litellm.BadRequestError` due to an invalid image format issue). Therefore, it cannot be confirmed that the feature importances visualization was successfully generated and is valid/viewable. The trajectory evidence also confirms that no steps related to the creation of this file were observed, making it impossible to validate the requirement.

judge_stats.criteria: Ripoti ya uainishaji, ikiwa ni pamoja na "usahihi," "urejeshaji," na "F1-score," inatengenezwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/metrics/classification_report.txt`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The file `results/metrics/classification_report.txt` exists but contains only a placeholder value `('placeholder\r\n', None)` instead of an actual classification report with accuracy, recall, and F1-score metrics. The trajectory evidence also confirms that no actual classification report was generated or saved — there is no recorded evidence of computing metrics such as accuracy, recall, or F1-score. The requirement has not been fulfilled.

A proper report should contain meaningful content such as model performance metrics, analysis results, and references to figures (like `feature_importances.png`).
